name: itcher
description: A UI to randomly select the next pitch to throw

scripts.unit: clear; python3 src/ml/data/split_data.py -r 10000; npm run save-sheets; jest --config tests/jest.config.js
scripts.tobrowser: tsc; python3 src/ml/data/split_data.py -r 100000; npm run save-sheets; browserify dist/main.js --standalone Main | derequire > builds/mainBundle.js
scripts.plot-models: tsc; python3 src/ml/data/split_data.py -r 500000; npm run save-sheets; node tests/experiments/measuringAccuracy/learnerAcc.js; python3 tests/experiments/measuringAccuracy/learnerAcc.py
